headline: Get 'defensive' with consumer staple stocks as Iran war drags
summary: As the Iran war rounds out its fourth week, Wall Street is still trying to make sense of the volatility afflicting markets (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) and the US economy.Powers Advisory Group managing partner Matt Powers lays out the areas investors can find opportunities in as the geopolitical conflict drags on longer, namely the defense industry.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock for Long-Term Investors and 2 We Brush Off
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

headline: Jim Cramer Says “If the War’s Over, We’re Not Going to Want to Own Lockheed”
